response.justification: The candidate has strong full-stack engineering experience, extensive exposure to cloud platforms (AWS), and relevant work with agentic workflows and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — key requirements for a Staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Proven experience with agentic workflows and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Strong cloud infrastructure exposure via AWS CDK and Kubernetes deployments
Demonstrated ability to lead technical initiatives and mentor through workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization — core required technologies
AI experience appears incidental rather than focused; lacks depth in production-grade GenAI systems
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise AI deployment experience
